evidence.label: CVD/HFH Secondary
evidence.text: CV death or worsening HF occurred in 25 (16.7%) FCM vs 36 (24.2%) placebo patients (HR 0.69; 95% CI, 0.41 to 1.17).

allOutcomes.title: Total HF hospitalizations and CV death

evidence.label: Primary HFH/CVD
evidence.text: The primary endpoint events totalled 293 (rate ratio 0.79; 95% CI, 0.62 to 1.01; P=0.059) in the FCM group and 372 in the placebo group.

evidence.label: Primary HFH/CVD
evidence.text: The primary endpoint occurred in 336 FDI (22.4/100 patient-years) vs 411 usual care (27.5/100 patient-years) (rate ratio 0.82; 95% CI, 0.66 to 1.02; P=0.070).

evidence.label: Hierarchical Composite
evidence.text: The hierarchical composite was not significantly different: win ratio 1.02 (99% CI, 0.87 to 1.18; P=0.78). CV death or HF hosp: HR 0.93 (95% CI, 0.81 to 1.06).

evidence.text: AACT-derived (auto-populated 2026-05-04). Sex: ALL; min age 18 Years; healthy volunteers: f. CRITERIA: "Inclusion Criteria:~1. Adult (≥18 years of age) able to provide signed, written informed consent.~2. Stable heart failure (NYHA II-IV) on maximally-tolerated background therapy (as determined by the site Principle Investigator) for at least 2 weeks prior to randomization.~3. Able and willing to perform a six-minute walk test (6MWT) at the time of randomization.~4. Reduced left ventricular ejection fraction. Assessment must be performed at least 12 weeks after major cardiac surgical intervention...
